description_long: This is a freestanding advertising board with a rectangular metal panel supported by three slender metal legs. The front face of the board displays weathered Russian text, with visible signs of rust, paint chipping, and surface wear, suggesting prolonged outdoor exposure. The text is printed in black over a faded tricolor background, likely representing the Russian flag, and is partially obscured by corrosion and dirt. The reverse side of the board is mostly dark and heavily stained, with no visible text or graphics. The supporting legs are thin, metallic, and slightly angled, providing stability while keeping the board elevated above the ground. The overall construction appears utilitarian, with no decorative frame or illumination features.
description: A weathered, freestanding metal advertising board with Russian text and a faded tricolor background, supported by three thin metal legs.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a dark, heavily stained metal surface with no visible text or graphics and three supporting legs.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the board's thin, flat panel and the slenderness of the supporting legs.
description_view_2: Front view displaying weathered Russian text over a faded tricolor background, with visible rust and surface wear.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the thinness of the panel and the angled support legs.
attribute_frame_design: frameless metal panel with thin, exposed edges and three slender metal legs
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed sign with Russian text and faded tricolor background, heavily weathered
